description: Structured pull request metadata produced by an agent after generating or applying a patch.

base_branch.description: Base branch where the pull request should be opened (e.g., main or develop).

body.description: Full pull request description including context, explanation of changes, and testing notes.

breaking_changes.description: Indicates whether the pull request introduces breaking changes.

head_branch.description: Branch containing the changes produced by the workflow.

labels.description: Optional labels that should be applied to the pull request.

migration_notes.description: Optional notes explaining required migrations or upgrade steps.

reviewers.description: Suggested reviewers for the pull request.

summary.description: Short summary of the change suitable for dashboards or notifications.

title: Agent Pull Request Artifact
